performance.reference_machine: Apple M5 Pro MacBook Pro, 18 cores, 48 GB RAM

scenario_results.description: The frozen 1–5 source corpus produces structured model-backed Brief records; trust labels are evaluated separately.
Every load-bearing statement has resolvable chunk citations and exact source spans.
The deterministic corpus scan finds no fabricated citations and rejects a seeded dangling citation.
The corpus passes title and long-substring echo guards.
Automated planted-gap checks are recorded; a human spot-check still owns semantic quality.
Answerable and unanswerable corpus checks pass, and saved answers reopen through UI/API/CLI; a human sample audit remains required.
The real-model injection case produces a safe Brief and an uncited insufficient-evidence Ask response with zero unauthorized effects.
